title.en: This is the name of the text.

content.en:
"The secret of the creation of the Black Wind Mountain!"

This is the name of the text.

Ye Tian carefully browsed it and was immediately shocked.

Black Wind Mountain turned out to be a force created by a domain ancestor, and the original ten kings were the ten personal disciples of that domain ancestor, what a great secret.

It stands to reason that the force created by the Domain Ancestor is a legendary force, and it should not only be of the level of Black Wind Mountain.

However, when that Domain Ancestor founded Black Wind Mountain, it was already on the verge of falling.

It turned out that the domain ancestor was called the Black Wind Domain Ancestor, not a person from the Divine Heaven Realm, but from an unknown realm, this domain ancestor cultivator had come to an end, and wanted to find a way to break through again, so he went deep into the Dark Forbidden Domain, crossed the endless Dark Forbidden Domain, and encountered many dangers.

After a long time, this Black Wind Domain Ancestor encountered one terrifying thing after another in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and finally came to the Divine Heaven Realm when he was about to fall.

But he was disappointed, the strongest person in the Divine Heaven Realm was only the domain ancestor, and there was no way to break through here.

At that time, the Black Wind Domain Ancestor no longer had the ability to go deep into the Dark Forbidden Domain to find other realms again, and the Black Wind Domain Ancestor's injuries were too serious, and he had injured the true foundation, and he was already dying.

As a result, the Black Wind Domain Ancestor selected ten True Inheritance disciples and prepared to leave their own inheritance in the Divine Heaven Realm.

In this way, the prototype of the Black Wind Mountain was created.

After the fall of the Black Wind Domain Ancestor, the Ten Kings began to grow the Black Wind Mountain, and over the long years, the Black Wind Mountain has also had many catastrophes, and finally relied on the Black Wind Domain Ancestor's heritage to break through again and again.

Black Wind Mountain also knows the truth of keeping a low profile, so it hides its strength, and the outside world doesn't know Black Wind Mountain's strength at all.

The basic people who really have a preliminary understanding of the strength of Black Wind Mountain are the Upper Triple Heaven forces, and Black Wind Mountain is unwilling to fight with these forces, coupled with the magic of the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, the Upper Triple Heaven Forces have no way to take Black Wind Mountain, they can't find their headquarters at all, and they can't catch the high-level.

And Ye Tian now knew that the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique was one of the inheritances from the Black Wind Domain Ancestor, and the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique he cultivated was only a weakened version.

The real original version is the Black Wind Realm Technique, a supreme secret technique that only Dao Ancestors can cultivate.

The classics of one gate record the secrets of one gate, which only generals can browse, and Ye Tian can browse to his heart's content, and he also knows many secrets of Black Wind Mountain.

But Ye Tian knew very well that there were more important secrets in the Black Wind Mountain that had not been opened to him, and even the Blood Demon General did not know about it.

At present, these secrets are only for Ye Tian to know more about Black Wind Mountain, but in fact, the only benefit is the secret of the Convergence Secret Technique, which is the secret that is helpful and guiding for his cultivation.

But these secrets also made Ye Tian understand that Black Wind Mountain is definitely a thick thigh, and it must be hugged tightly.

And the reason why Black Wind Mountain is willing to share these secrets is also to make the high-level leaders above the general more recognized and loyal to Black Wind Mountain.

Next, General Bloody Demon took Ye Tian to the place where the Thousand Dao Techniques were inherited, and asked Ye Tian to select three Thousand Dao Techniques.

For these three Thousand Dao Techniques, Ye Tian chose and chosen, and finally determined the three Thousand Dao Techniques.

These three Thousand Dao Techniques are-

Selfless vacuum, ten thousand true spears, Tiangang is extremely fast.

Among them, the selfless vacuum is a Thousand Dao techniques that involve space, nothingness, and soul, but it is mainly related to space, so Ye Tian can cultivate him at the True Ancestor level.

The Ten Thousand Evil True Spear is a Thousand Dao Technique in the attack class, which corresponds to the Dao-level natal talent of the Underworld, and has an extremely high degree of fit, so Ye Tian can also cultivate the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear.

As for Tiangang's extreme speed, it is a speed-based Zhongqian Dao technique, once practiced, the speed is so fast that even the Dao Ancestors are difficult to catch up, and it is an excellent Zhongqian Dao technique for fighting and escaping.

Of course.

If Ye Tian wants to succeed in cultivating these three Thousand Dao Techniques and elevate them to the realm of Xiaocheng or above, I'm afraid it will take a long time.

After all, he couldn't take the Heavenly Soul Pill anymore, and it was relatively rare for a treasure that could have an effect on him and greatly improve his comprehension.

Unless Ye Tian was able to break one ancient realm record after another, then his comprehension would be greatly increased, and he would be able to quickly comprehend the Thousand Dao Techniques.

After the selection of the Thousand Dao Technique, the next step is to choose an exclusive independent space.

Wow!

With a wave of his hand, the bloody general appeared.

These points of light represent small realms, and they are spaces that can be used to reward generals, and there is currently no owner.

"General Nine Extremes, at present, the realms of the other five kings are very badly damaged, so they are all closed, and they are being repaired with all their might, only the small realm of the Wind King is still operating, and these are independent spaces that can be selected at present. You choose one, and then use the general's order to refine these independent space formations, and you can control the independent space. Moreover, the next time you enter the Black Wind Small Realm, you can choose to directly enter your own independent space, and it will be difficult for others to detect your movements, even I don't know if you have entered the Wind King Small Realm. General Bloody introduced.

"I'll see!"

Ye Tian saw the situation of the independent spaces through the points of light.

Some of the independent spaces still have various buildings left, some of them are more primitive, similar to primitive times, and some of them are more barren, as if they had experienced a great war.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian picked an independent space.

This independent space is nothing special, similar to the environment of the earth, except that it is countless times larger than the earth in front of it.

There are mountains, seas, deserts and various environments, so it is very suitable for Ye Tian.

"Okay, then I'll give you this independent space!"

The bloody general agreed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered this independent space with the general's order, and named it the Nine Poles Space, which means that this space belongs to his Nine Poles General.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian used the general's order to refine the formation of this space and completely controlled this independent space.

At the same time, Ye Tian also sensed a lot of space in the Black Wind Small Realm, but some spaces couldn't.

"One of the benefits of being a general is that you can always be aware of the situation in many public spaces!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian stayed in his Nine Poles space, busy transforming this space.

He didn't bring his wife in, and although the space was large, it was still a bit boring compared to the outside world, and it was inconvenient to enter at first.

However, Ye Tian still selected a group of geniuses from the human race to serve as his foundation in the Black Wind Mountain in the future, and many geniuses were also willing to take refuge in Ye Tian.

In this way, the Nine Poles Space slowly became lively.

----------------

Little Black Wind Tower!

This is a cultivation pagoda that only generals can enter, and it can open a hundred thousand times time acceleration, but because the cost is not small, it requires ten points a year.

Since one year is equivalent to 100,000 years of cultivation, even if it costs ten points, there are many generals who are willing to enter here to cultivate.

Of course, if it was only 100,000 times faster, the generals would not spend those ten points.

The main reason is that the chaotic vitality contained inside the Little Black Wind Tower is extremely rich, and it can slightly increase the cultivation speed and comprehension speed.

Ye Tian has a lot of points in his hands, so he naturally doesn't care about just ten points.

So, Ye Tian entered this small Black Wind Pagoda and began to cultivate.

After stepping into the middle of the Great Dao, Ye Tian knew very well that it was unrealistic for him to make rapid progress, it would still take a long time, and if he didn't use time to speed up, the speed of progress would be too slow.

Time has passed year by year, and it has been a hundred years in the blink of an eye.

At this time, Ye Tian had already spent 1,000 points, which was a big number for many peak masters.

In the outside world for a hundred years, Ye Tian has been cultivating in the Little Black Wind Pagoda for tens of millions of years, and then his progress is not very great, his cultivation is still in the middle of the Great Dao, but it is close to the middle of the Great Dao to the extreme.

For Ye Tian, his biggest progress was to use the many treasures that had improved his comprehension and the increase in the records of the four ancient realms to initially introduce the cultivation of those three middle thousand dao techniques.

The introduction of the three middle thousand dao techniques, plus a small realm of the Great Wilderness Law Body, the cultivation has also improved a lot, and Ye Tian's strength is now much stronger than when he fought with the Xuanling True Ancestor.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Nine Extremes Space and returned to the Terran territory.
